title: Assorted Allays x Fresh Animations
description: For all the Freshly Animated Allays you'll ever need!
body:
[![Spark_server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bcd4c7a1170269c7c6f9422f2bc574184de8942.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3078)

![behold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ab595d2f3521960fd5901014ac4433521260ff.png)
***
Assorted Allays is the perfect resource pack for those seeking more variety, featuring 200+ custom variants. This version of the pack features custom animations from the Fresh Animations resource pack by FreshLX!

![main_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194b03e90bc73bfe9b1a3f96fe0d430bcc41ae34.png)

![addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478a94a0cfc1ccfdcd5594cb9fd0ea995deb1003.png)
***
This resource pack requires the mentioned mods marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ad839ff3ba39226c2e38561fed87845e8314a22_0.webp)

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7925f8af6bb75eb904febe9b92c84a6c902ba4d7.png)
***
These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skins and spawn naturally.
The pack is formatted to make it easy to create addons!

![Allay Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/a5sCIlb.png)

![notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7040573760b45a4840469e65396ef3f07c4896.png)
***
The following resource packs MUST be formatted in the following way:

![allay_order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e4108ca6c915c723affac215d7fea8f8bf09f6.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***
[![discord_link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2d9f2c414441c5741f635153fc6820f884bfd9_0.webp)](discord.gg/kYYmAWQ)

![license](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eda2698ccdd602757b99afcb8431a6e875e5ea2f.png)
